_description: Resource addresses whose drift is accepted and should not trigger alerts or PRs. resource_address can be an exact match or a prefix (e.g. 'aws_security_group.' matches all SGs). drift_type can be a field name, 'ingress', 'egress', 'deleted_externally', or '*' for all drift on this resource. expires is optional — omit for permanent exceptions.

_example.reason: Security group rules managed via AWS Firewall Manager
